sessions.title: Reflection: I want to build this app but I keep getting stu…

messages.content: I want to build this app but I keep getting stuck in overthinking and approval-seeking.
I’m seeing inner clarity at the center of this. A possible pattern is approval-seeking or image management. The next useful move is to write a two-column note for autopilot vs authentic desire.
I’m seeing inner clarity at the center of this. There is room to turn this into a clearer commitment. The next useful move is to write a two-column note for autopilot vs authentic desire.

report.summary: This reflection is surfacing a tension between instinct and conditioning. Core theme: Inner clarity. No strong recurring distortion was detected yet. Source note: "hi"
report.philosophy: Reflective inquiry: slow down until the real motive becomes visible.
nextQuestions: Which part of this feels socially inherited rather than personally chosen?

notes.title: MVP principle
notes.content: Keep the first version local, simple, and useful.

actions.title: Summarize this session into one sentence of intent
actions.why: A single-line intention helps future sessions stay aligned.

actions.title: Write a two-column note for autopilot vs authentic desire
actions.why: Separating the voices makes the internal conflict easier to see.
